criteria.name: Functionality
criteria.description: The AI apps should offer a range of functionalities, including content creation, image generation, video production, productivity enhancement, and communication improvements.

criteria.name: Versatility
criteria.description: The AI tools should be versatile and adaptable to various tasks such as brainstorming, writing, coding, and research.

criteria.name: User Experience
criteria.description: The AI apps should provide a seamless and intuitive user experience.

criteria.name: Integration
criteria.description: The AI apps should integrate well with other tools and platforms to streamline workflows.

criteria.name: Customer Support
criteria.description: AI chatbots should handle user queries, payment support, and outage reporting.

criteria.name: Free tier availability
criteria.description: Apps that offer a free tier or free trial to allow users to test the app's capabilities.
